Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0A00 "HALCYON-0A00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Halcyon.prg"
Metadata.Notes: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $0AD3. However the true start address is $0A00.
